texto: Heavens is here 'neath the mountain walls,In the song of the wind and the waterfalls,In the watchful stars that blanket the nightAnd the music of birds before the dawn light.Heaven is here in our mountain keep.In the silence and dim of the forest deep,From the chestnut tall as the mightiest mast,To the laurel flowers in the shadow it casts.Heaven is here on theses mountains high, In ancient stone castles that challenge the sky,In the thunder and flash that ring from their fightAnd the meadows made gold by the day's final light.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Oechsle sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Heavens is here 'neath the mountain walls,In the song of the wind and the waterfalls,In the watch…” articula sucesso, heaven, nature em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
